Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Star of Desires Ring

When attacking, the unit has a 50% chance to blow up the target, dealing pure damage equal to 160% of the unit's attack to the target and all enemies in a small radius around them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The unit also stuns the affected enemies for 1,5 sec and steals 20% of their damage for 3,5 sec. Stacks up to 6 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
